Metadata.title: Lunatech — Creative Technology Studio
Metadata.description: Premium creative technology: highly interactive websites and mobile apps with motion design and 3D — built to feel alive, not like a template.

hero.headline: Digital craft that moves and pulls you in
hero.sub: We design and build immersive web and mobile experiences — rich motion, real-time 3D, and interaction-led storytelling for brands that want to stand apart from static agency sites.

services.title: What we build
services.subtitle: Capabilities focused on feel, depth, and performance — not generic layouts.

web.title: Immersive web
web.desc: Highly interactive sites and web apps — animation systems, scroll narratives, WebGL where it earns its place, and engineering you can ship.

mobile.title: Mobile applications
mobile.desc: Native-feel iOS and Android — fluid gestures, motion-native UI, and polish that matches your brand’s ambition.

design.title: UI / UX design
design.desc: Interfaces designed for motion and depth from day one — hierarchy, rhythm, and states that feel intentional.

ai.title: AI integration
ai.desc: Smart features that fit the product — copilots, automation, and UX that stays clear under real use.

branding.title: Brand & design systems
branding.desc: Visual language, tokens, and components that scale — including motion and 3D rules, not just static guidelines.

motion.title: Motion & realtime 3D
motion.desc: Cinematic transitions, micro-interaction design, and Three.js / R3F scenes that support the story instead of distracting from it.

about.title: Vision
about.mission: Lunatech is a creative technology studio. We specialize in visually engaging, highly interactive digital products — the kind of work that demonstrates advanced frontend craft, not a minimalist slide deck.
about.philosophy: Dark, cinematic, futuristic when it fits the brand — but always in service of clarity and emotion. We layer motion and 3D with purpose: to tell a story, guide attention, and make the interface memorable.
about.why: Senior-led team, short feedback loops, and code organized for iteration. We treat the site itself as a living sample of what we can do for you.
about.tagline: Interactive by default. Premium by craft.
about.moonBlurb: The moon in our identity stands for orbit and light — the pull of strong design and the calm focus we bring to complex builds.

portfolio.title: Work & inspiration
portfolio.subtitle: Wide tiles with animated dark 3D-style web previews and Aura reference links. Open site for the live browser; case notes in the modal.
portfolio.previewHint: The header is a CSS motion scene (not a screenshot). Open site for Aura’s real UI.
portfolio.demoNote: Sample reference (opens Aura in a new tab)

project1.title: Nebula Commerce
project1.summary: Headless storefront with cinematic product storytelling and scroll-driven narrative.
project1.body: Inspiration / placeholder: conversion-led UX, edge performance, modular design system, and motion-led product pages for seasonal campaigns.

project2.title: Pulse Fintech
project2.summary: Real-time portfolio experience with motion-led onboarding for trust.
project2.body: Inspiration / placeholder: biometric flows, accessible data visualization, and animated states that reinforce security and clarity.

project3.title: Aura Lifestyle
project3.summary: Wellness app with habit loops, glass UI, and retention-focused craft.
project3.body: Inspiration / placeholder: habit design, layered interface depth, and localized content strategy across multiple markets.

project4.title: Vertex AI Console
project4.summary: Operator tools for ML pipelines — dense UI, still readable in motion.
project4.body: Inspiration / placeholder: terminal-native patterns, role-based workspaces, and latency-aware live charts.

project5.title: Lunar Rebrand
project5.summary: Full identity for a space-tech hardware startup — including motion logo.
project5.body: Inspiration / placeholder: wordmark, animated identity, and component library aligned with manufacturing partners.

project6.title: Signal Launch Film
project6.summary: Product reveal and social cutdowns — shader-led hero and modular story beats.
project6.body: Inspiration / placeholder: real-time visuals, audio-reactive teasers, and paid-media-ready modular storytelling.

contact.title: Let’s build something unmistakable
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your product or campaign. We typically reply within two business days.
contact.formNote: Opens your email app — we don’t store this on our servers.
